name: Poppyseed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
3. Blend in the juice, butter, lemon peel, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
4. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, poppy seeds, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) in another bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the egg mixture, beating until well combined.
6. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean and the edges are golden brown.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Nutrition information per piece: 206 calories, 4 gm protein, 21 gm carbohydrate, 12 gm fat, 74 mg cholesterol, 265 mg sodium, 1 diabetic starch/bread exchange, 1/4 diabetic medium-fat meat exchange, 2 diabetic fat exchanges, 1/2 diabetic fruit exchange.
